articles.title: Oilersnation Radio: Oilers demolish the Kraken for their first blowout win of the season
articles.description: It’s Friday afternoon, which means a fresh episode of Oilersnation Radio is ready to massage your eardrums with an hour of off-season Oilers talk. On today’s podcast, the fellas discussed the Oilers’ demolition of the Seattle Kraken, line combos, some injury updates, line combos, and much more. We kicked off the Friday episode of ONR…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: Five Oilers who are elevating their play in recent games
articles.description: After suffering a 9-1 loss earlier this season, the Edmonton Oilers finally got to enjoy the other side of a 9-something beatdown, defeating the Seattle Kraken 9-4 in their most recent outing. They battled their way through a tough start to the season with lengthy road trips, and now, with some time to settle in…
articles.author: Sean Panganiban

articles.title: NHL Notebook: The latest on Quinn Hughes
articles.description: Quinn Hughes’ name has been circulating in trade rumours quite a bit in recent times. It’s been a rough season for the Vancouver Canucks. Through 27 games, their 23 points are the fewest in the league, although they do have a higher point percentage than the Calgary Flames. Hughes, their captain, has had an okay…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: Flashback Friday: Oilers trade for Kevin McClelland
articles.description: Early in the 1983-84 season, the Oilers acquired a player who helped them win four Stanley Cups. This edition of Flashback Friday looks at the Kevin McClelland trade, which celebrates its 42nd anniversary on Friday. On Dec. 5, 1983, the Oilers sent Tom Roulston to the Pittsburgh Penguins in exchange for a 1984 sixth-round pick…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: Oilers offence emerges in a big way
articles.description: Three goals in each period. Four goals at 5×5. Four power play goals. One shorthanded goal. Six different goal scorers. Nine goals in a game for only the third time in the last 20 seasons, and the Edmonton Oilers had a lot of smiles after their 9-4 victory over the Seattle Kraken last night. The…
articles.author: Jason Gregor

articles.title: Oilers Prospect Update: Fischer continues point streak, Wakely scores first NCAA hat trick, and more
articles.description: It is a North American prospect update, and there were a few players in the Edmonton pipeline who have had strong outings recently. Paul Fischer has continued his point streak that has now reached five games, and his NCAA counterpart, Dalyn Wakely, netted his first career hat trick and continues to lead UMass Lowell in…
articles.author: Spencer Pomoty

articles.title: The Day After 28.0: Oilers score nine and feel fine after offensive breakout
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers needed that. They really needed that. About everything that could’ve gone their way Thursday night did in their 9-4 walloping of the Seattle Kraken, as Connor McDavid notched his 13th career hat trick, four players posted three or more points, and many a milestone was hit. For McDavid, he’s faced some criticism all…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Connor McDavid’s hat trick, Ryan Nugent-Hopkins quietly solid, and Oilers getting more from Vasily Podkolzin
articles.description: We didn’t have to wait long for the Oilers and Kraken to square off again after what was a spicy afternoon in Seattle on Saturday. That game started to boil over a little bit, and it was nice to see two Pacific Division teams getting fired up and getting after it. Ultimately, the better team…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: No revenge for Seattle as Oilers hammer Kraken 9-4: Recap, Highlights, and Reaction
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers are back. On Thursday evening, the Oilers smashed the Seattle Kraken 9-4 in a much-needed win. The Oilers are now 12-11-5 this season with three more games on this five-game home stand. Just over seven minutes into the game, the Oilers took a 1-0 lead thanks to a short-side shot by Connor…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: McDavid's hat trick ties Messier; Oilers rout Kraken
articles.description: Connor McDavid had his 13th career hat trick to tie Mark Messier for fourth in Oilers history in Edmonton's 9-4 romp over the Seattle Kraken on Thursday night.

articles.title: Goldeneyes place Sarah Nurse on long-term injured reserve
articles.description: Nurse only appeared in Vancouver’s first game of the season.
articles.author: Tyler Kuehl
